name: cooperative-challenge-01
title: Cooperative Challenge
author: ilinxa
description: A safe-by-design cooperative team challenge card: one shared goal, a collective progress meter (current / target, never per-member), a whole-team reward chip (system D-08), and a penalty-free, team-level opt-in where opted-out is a neutral, first-class 'joinable' state — the never-forced rule made literal (joining is a prominent invite; leaving is one click with no confirm/guilt; a visible no-penalty hint states refusing is cost-free). On done, a lightweight inline 'Completed together' acknowledgement (non-blocking, no modal); the heavy celebration overlay belongs to team-feedback-loop-01 (E6), composed alongside — neither triggers the other. Opt-in is controlled-only; omitting onOptInChange collapses to a read-only card. Ships shadcn-style: a batteries-included <CooperativeChallenge01> plus a headless <CooperativeChallengeRoot> + flat parts (Header, Progress, Reward, OptIn) + context-free primitives (ChallengeProgressMeter, ChallengeRewardChip, OptInToggle, TeamMemberStack, CooperativeChallengeSkeleton). Emits challenge.opened (first mount, double-emit-guarded) + challenge.opt-in via onEvent. Cooperative + team-scoped: collective progress + whole-team reward only — no ranking, no per-member split, no public surface. Portable — zero next/*, SSR-safe, imports no other registry component. Third component of the gamification-system.
